category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Enlightenment Foundation Libraries; the official EFL README describes libraries for data structures, communication, rendering, widgets, and more.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description expands EFL as Enlightenment Foundation Libraries.
docs_sources: Official Enlightenment documentation page lists EFL documentation; official EFL README points users to www.enlightenment.org/doc.
repo_sources: Official Enlightenment source page says all source repositories are on git.enlightenment.org and gives git clone http://git.enlightenment.org/enlightenment/efl.git for EFL core libraries.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names EFL; official EFL README describes rendering, widgets, communication, and library components.
